name: Tri-Cities
author: ryandicicco
description: Detailed map of the Kennewick–Pasco–Richland metro area (Tri-Cities) using US Census LODES 2022 tract-level origin-destination commute data. 333 demand points, 328K residents, 328K jobs, 6,451 commute OD pairs. Special demand for Tri-Cities Airport (PSC; 2,700 daily pax), three universities (WSU-TC, CBC, Heritage U-TC), and TRAC event center. Includes 43,822-building collision index, multi-scale city/suburb/neighborhood labels, and PSC airport runways.
